code: import React from'react';import{useAuthStore}from'../store/authStore';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthDebug=()=>{const authState=useAuthStore();const storedToken=localStorage.getItem('token');const handleTestLogin=async()=>{try{await authState.login('test@example.com','password');console.log('Test login completed');}catch(error){console.error('Test login failed:',error);}};const handleClearAuth=()=>{authState.logout();localStorage.clear();};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"p-6 bg-slate-800 text-white min-h-screen",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{className:"text-2xl mb-6",children:"Auth Debug Panel"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"mb-6",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"text-xl mb-3",children:"Current Auth State:"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("pre",{className:"bg-slate-900 p-4 rounded",children:JSON.stringify({isAuthenticated:authState.isAuthenticated,user:authState.user,token:authState.token,isLoading:authState.isLoading,storedToken:storedToken},null,2)})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"space-x-4",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleTestLogin,className:"bg-blue-600 px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-blue-700",children:"Test Login (test@example.com)"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:handleClearAuth,className:"bg-red-600 px-4 py-2 rounded hover:bg-red-700",children:"Clear Auth"})]})]});};export default AuthDebug;
